# MailCarrier

> User-friendly, provider-aware Laravel + Filament mailing platform with templates, previews, logs, attachments, queues, and webhooks. MailCarrier v3 requires PHP 8.4+, Laravel 13, and Filament v4.

## Upgrading

- [v2 → v3 agent upgrade instructions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mailcarrierapp/mailcarrier/main/ai/upgrades/v2-to-v3.md): step-by-step, command-first instructions written for AI coding agents to upgrade a host app to MailCarrier v3 (Filament v4, PHP 8.4, Laravel 13, in-house DTOs).
- [v2 → v3 upgrade guide (human)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mailcarrierapp/mailcarrier/main/UPGRADE.md): the same migration written for humans, with rationale and before/after examples.

## Documentation

- [README](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mailcarrierapp/mailcarrier/main/README.md): features, quick start (classic and Docker), and testing.
- [composer.json](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mailcarrierapp/mailcarrier/main/composer.json): current dependency constraints and supported PHP/Laravel/Filament versions.

## Source

- [Repository](https://github.com/mailcarrierapp/mailcarrier): full source code.
- [Releases](https://github.com/mailcarrierapp/mailcarrier/releases): version history and changelog.
